name: Mo Gilligan's All Star Happy Hour
original_name: Mo Gilligan's All Star Happy Hour
overview: Award-winning stand-up sensation Mo Gilligan will be joined live by all-star celebrity guests for the happiest hour on television... there’ll be a joyful mix of high-energy comedy, music and one of a kind games as members of the public go head-to-head with famous faces in a quest to win some amazing prizes.

trailers.title: Grime Gran Is A Big Fan Of TikTok | All Star Happy Hour With Mo Gilligan
I Made A TV Show In 48hrs From My House | All Star Happy Hour BTS
